items.title: Shopping List Templates
items.description: Choose from built-in templates (Weekly Groceries, Party Supplies, Household Essentials, Travel Packing, Baby & Kids) when creating a new list, with pre-filled starter items.

items.title: Item Sorting
items.description: List details now include item sort options for status, name, newest, and oldest ordering.

items.title: Installable Release APK
items.description: Release assets now publish the ABI-specific arm64 APK again for direct device installs.

items.title: Notification Preferences
items.description: Customize which push notifications you receive for list activities.
